title: Peruvian Crumble Dessert
description: A sweet and tangy crumble dessert infused with the flavors of Peru.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the almond, tender apricots, sour cherries, quinoa flour, sugar, and brown sugar.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x9-inch baking dish.
In a separate bowl, mix together the crumble topping ingredients.
Spread the crumble topping evenly over the fruit mixture.
Bake for 40-45 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown and the fruit is tender.
Serve warm, topped with vanilla ice cream if desired.
